note: Lightweight woven silk: very compliant (low E*t ~500 N/m); stretches most
sources: Wang2011 (silk<<denim); arxiv 2212.08790 (membrane E 0.8-32.6 MPa, low end); Hursa2009 plain-weave Poisson 0.34-0.50

note: Thin woven polyester banner: low E*t ~1500 N/m (thin)
sources: arxiv 2212.08790; polyester banner specs; Penava2014 woven Poisson

note: Woven worsted suiting: compliant (FAST/SiroFAST secant ~3000 N/m)
sources: FAST/SiroFAST E100 wool extensibility; Wang2011 (knit/wool compliant)

note: Plain woven cotton shirting: stiff-in-stretch but below denim
sources: Zhang2019 cotton Ex/Ey=178/98 MPa, Poisson 0.39/0.25; Wang2011; Miguel2012

note: Heavy cotton twill: normalization anchor ~15000 N/m per width
sources: Wang2011 11oz black denim (stiffest in stretch); Miguel2012; twill Poisson lower (Hursa2009)

note: Chrome-tanned garment leather: stiffest per width (thick)
sources: Efendioglu2025 (ISO 3376) E~77 MPa x t~0.75mm ~58 kN/m; stiff but elongates to break ~15%
